inputs.prompt: Premium SaaS vector hero illustration, AI-powered web data extraction platform, multiple web sources connected through intelligent data pipelines into a centralized knowledge hub, structured business data, lead generation, market research, competitive intelligence, interconnected nodes, flowing data streams, abstract technology network, modern flat vector design, blue-indigo-teal gradients, clean whitespace, enterprise software branding, futuristic yet professional, SVG illustration, Dribbble-quality, landing page hero artwork, card thumbnail banner, no dashboard, no text, no people.
